task_title: Core Shape Drift Cleanup, Registry Closure, Migration Queue, and Quarantine Gate V0.1

language_and_encoding_policy.taskpack_internal_files: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM only. No Cyrillic text inside taskpack machine or markdown files.
language_and_encoding_policy.canonical_repo_artifacts: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM for JSON schemas, machine receipts, validators, matrices, and contracts unless an explicit OFFICIO owner-facing Russian exception is declared.
language_and_encoding_policy.owner_facing_russian_runtime_output: Russian owner-facing final summary is allowed only through OFFICIO_AGENTIS authority and must not contaminate machine JSON. Owner-facing Russian must be routed through OFFICIO.
language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: Only runtime owner-facing FINAL_OWNER_SUMMARY_RU.md may be Russian through OFFICIO authority; taskpack itself remains ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM.

enhanced_ghost_evolve.requirement: Every repeated manual fix, repo-shape rule, metric, matrix, alert, quarantine rule, contour lesson, or validation rule discovered during the task must be converted into durable organ knowledge: contract, schema, matrix, validator, template, receipt, address-book entry, or next-task card.
enhanced_ghost_evolve.servitor_load_reduction: Servitor must reduce future manual context load by moving decisions into organs, support runtime, validators, metrics, and Administratum indexes.

forbidden: mass move without migration queue and owner approval
